---
description: Start work on a new ticket - runs pre-flight, investigates, and proposes a change
argument-hint: Paste ticket description or URL
---

Use the **new-ticket** skill to start work on a new ticket.

Pass the user's input as the ticket description. The skill handles pre-flight checks, codebase investigation, and flows into OpenSpec proposal.

All steps, guardrails, and handoff rules are defined in the skill — follow them exactly.
